headline: VCTR Proposes the Acquisition of JHG, Sees $500M in Cost Synergies
summary: Victory Capital proposes a fully financed acquisition of Janus Henderson and expects $500M in cost synergies from the transaction.

raw.headline: VCTR Proposes the Acquisition of JHG, Sees $500M in Cost Synergies
raw.summary: Victory Capital proposes a fully financed acquisition of Janus Henderson and expects $500M in cost synergies from the transaction.

headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Avoid
summary: Wall Street is overwhelmingly bullish on the stocks in this article, with price targets suggesting significant upside potential. However, it’s worth remembering that analysts rarely issue sell ratings, partly because their firms often seek other business from the same companies they cover.
